items.q: How do I get started with Wholeup?
items.a: It's simple — book a free 30-minute strategy call. We'll audit your current digital presence, understand your goals, and recommend the right package. No obligation, no hard sell.

items.q: Do you work with small businesses and startups?
items.a: Absolutely. We work with everyone from funded startups to established enterprises. We have package options starting from ₹8,000/month to suit every stage of growth.

items.q: Which industries do you specialize in?
items.a: We have deep experience in eCommerce, SaaS, EdTech, D2C brands, local businesses, finance, healthcare, and real estate. Our frameworks adapt to any industry.

items.q: How long does it take to see results?
items.a: Paid ads can show results within the first week. SEO typically takes 3–6 months for significant movement. Social media growth is usually visible within 30 days. We set honest expectations in every proposal.

items.q: Do you offer one-time projects or only monthly retainers?
items.a: Both. We offer one-time projects for web design, brand identity, and audits. For ongoing services like SEO, paid ads, and social media management, we recommend monthly retainers for best results.

items.q: Will I have a dedicated account manager?
items.a: Yes. Every client gets a dedicated account manager who is your single point of contact. You'll also have access to our reporting dashboard and weekly/monthly performance reports.

items.q: How do you measure and report results?
items.a: We set KPIs at the start of every engagement and track them in a shared live dashboard. You get weekly updates and a detailed monthly performance report with recommendations.

items.q: What is the minimum contract length?
items.a: We recommend a minimum 3-month engagement for best results, especially for SEO and paid ads. However, we can discuss month-to-month options on a case-by-case basis.
Never. Our pricing is fully transparent. The only additional costs are your ad spend (for paid campaigns), which flows directly to the ad platform and is not marked up by us.
Our service fees are non-refundable as we invest resources from day one. However, if you're not satisfied after 30 days, we will work with you to adjust the strategy at no extra cost.

items.q: Can I upgrade or change my plan later?
items.a: Yes, you can upgrade, downgrade, or add services at any billing cycle. We're flexible and will always recommend the option that suits your current stage of growth.

items.q: Do you manage ad spend, or do we control our own budget?
items.a: You always control your own ad budget. Your ad accounts remain in your name. We manage the campaigns as an authorized manager — we never take control of your billing or budget without your approval.

items.q: What platforms do you advertise on?
items.a: Google (Search, Display, YouTube, Shopping), Meta (Facebook & Instagram), LinkedIn, Pinterest, and Snapchat. We recommend platforms based on where your audience actually is.

items.q: Do I need to provide content, or do you create everything?
items.a: We handle all content creation — copywriting, graphics, video editing, and strategy. We may request brand assets (logo, product photos) and your input on the creative direction, but the execution is entirely on us.
